enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a day working gutters on two houses, helping his mom vacuum, do dishes, and move air conditioners for $15, and staying up until midnight working on a Colorado defunct ski resorts project (entry 29 of 87). He mentions listening to an audiobook about Theodosius and the fall of the Roman Empire, and signs off noting extreme tiredness.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Confident he can finish defunct ski resorts this week, notes a one-for-one success rate on predictions
Acknowledges he is genuinely exhausted, compares it to falling asleep at the wheel
